Who I Am

About Me

Education

Currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering at MIT-WPU, Pune — in my first year. My academic focus centers on Data Structures in C, Digital Logic, and foundational Computer Science theory.

Interests & Hobbies
  • Programming & Algorithmic Logic (C — pointers, recursion, DSC)
  • Poetry — free verse and traditional haiku (5-7-5)
  • Digital Electronics — binary arithmetic & circuit design
  • Gaming — Steam classics like Prince of Persia
Goals
  • Become a proficient backend systems & data engine engineer
  • Build a strong technical portfolio for top recruiters
  • Contribute to environmental sustainability through tech (e-waste)
  • Continue growing as a poet and creative voice
Strengths
  • Algorithmic thinking — breaking complex problems into clear steps
  • Versatility — fluid between engineering rigour and creative writing
  • Collaborative mindset — experience leading & presenting in teams
  • Technical discipline — dedicated to mastery through deliberate practice
Technical Skills
C Programming Data Structures MATLAB Discrete Math Digital Logic Graph Theory Cryptography Combinatorics Circuit Design Probability

Work & Innovation

Projects

♻️
Ai4A Program · Group Project

Smart E-Waste Management System

An integrated, AI-assisted smart system for managing electronic waste — addressing collection, segregation, and responsible recycling. The project proposes a digital platform that connects consumers, collection centres, and recyclers, with automated categorization and real-time tracking of e-waste disposal. Designed with environmental sustainability and circular economy principles at its core.

AI Integration IoT Sensors Sustainability Circular Economy System Design
Role: Team member — contributed to feasibility analysis, system design, and presentation deck (AS-1201).
Design Thinking Project · Academic

Smart Film Material — UV/NIR Shielding

A Technical Feasibility Analysis of a cutting-edge smart film material with UV/NIR shielding and self-cleaning properties. The study explores the viability of applying such materials in building windows, automotive glass, and solar panels — reducing heat load, improving energy efficiency, and eliminating maintenance costs. The design thinking process involved empathy mapping, problem framing, ideation, prototyping concepts, and technical assessment.

Materials Science UV/NIR Shielding Energy Efficiency Design Thinking Feasibility Analysis
Role: Individual Technical Feasibility Analysis — research, writing, and slide presentation.
🔬
⚙️
ACE Project · Engineering

ACE Engineering Project

A hands-on engineering project completed as part of the ACE (Applied and Creative Engineering) program at MIT-WPU. This project involved applying core computer science and engineering principles to solve a real-world problem — combining technical implementation with structured documentation and team-based delivery. It reinforced skills in project planning, collaborative problem-solving, and technical communication.

Applied Engineering C Programming Team Collaboration Problem Solving Documentation
Role: Active team member — technical implementation, testing, and documentation.
